---
title: WUI Wildfire Explorer
date: '2026-03-22'
description: A GEE App for Visualizing Risk
categories:
- Fire
- Geospatial
image: featured.webp
image-alt: WUI Wildfire Explorer showing wildland-urban interface risk visualization
featured: true
---

[Launch Tool](https://ee-weidignc.projects.earthengine.app/view/wui-wildfire){.nw-btn .nw-btn-primary target="_blank"}

A Google Earth Engine application that visualizes wildland-urban interface (WUI) dynamics, large wildfire patterns, and burn severity trends. Monitor how development encroaches on fire-prone landscapes and assess regional wildfire risk.
